2604.01025.title: Fast and Accurate Probing of In-Training LLMs' Downstream Performances
2604.01025.paper_summary: The paradigm of scaling Large Language Models (LLMs) in both parameter size and test time has pushed the boundaries of AI capabilities, but at the cost of making the traditional generative evaluation paradigm prohibitively expensive, therefore making the latency of LLM's in-training downstream performance evaluation unbearable. However, simple metrics like training loss (perplexity) are not always correlated with downstream performance, as sometimes their trends diverge from the actual task outcomes. This dilemma calls for a method that is computationally efficient and sufficiently accurate in measuring model capabilities. To address this challenge, we introduce a new in-training evaluation paradigm that uses a lightweight probe for monitoring downstream performance. The probes take the internal representations of LLM checkpoints (during training) as input and directly predict the checkpoint's performance on downstream tasks measured by success probability (i.e., pass@1). We design several probe architectures, validating their effectiveness using the OLMo3-7B's checkpoints across a diverse set of downstream tasks. The probes can accurately predict a checkpoint's performance (with avg. AUROC$>$0.75), have decent generalizability across checkpoints (earlier predicts later), and reduce the computation latency from $\sim$1 hr (using conventional generative evaluation method) to $\sim$3 min. In sum, this work presents a practical and scalable in-training downstream evaluation paradigm, enabling a more agile, informed, and efficient LLM development process.
2604.01025.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在參數大小和測試時間上的擴展範式推動了人工智慧能力的邊界，但代價是使傳統的生成評估範式變得過於昂貴，因此使得LLM在訓練過程中的下游性能評估的延遲變得難以忍受。<lb/>然而，像訓練損失（困惑度）這樣的簡單指標並不總是與下游性能相關，因為有時它們的趨勢與實際任務結果背道而馳。<lb/>這一困境呼喚一種計算效率高且足夠準確的測量模型能力的方法。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了一種新的訓練過程評估範式，使用輕量級探針來監控下游性能。<lb/>這些探針將LLM檢查點（在訓練過程中）的內部表示作為輸入，並直接預測檢查點在下游任務上的性能，通過成功概率（即pass@1）來衡量。<lb/>我們設計了幾種探針架構，並使用OLMo3-7B的檢查點在多樣的下游任務中驗證它們的有效性。<lb/>這些探針可以準確預測檢查點的性能（平均AUROC$>$0.75），在檢查點之間具有良好的泛化能力（早期預測後期），並將計算延遲從約1小時（使用傳統生成評估方法）減少到約3分鐘。<lb/>總之，這項工作提出了一種實用且可擴展的訓練過程下游評估範式，使得LLM的開發過程更加靈活、知情和高效。
2604.01025.author: Zhichen Liu et.al.
2604.01025.authors: Zhichen Liu, Tianle Lun, Zhibin Wen, Hao An, Yulin Ou, Jianhui Xu, Hao Zhang, Wenyi Fang, Yang Zheng, Yang Xu
